debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i i) ν (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
-- reduce to the corresponding coordinate map on the product space
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n))).trans
      (by simp [wignerMeasureDist])

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

-- the diagonal entry is exactly the coordinate projection at `⟨(i,i), le_rfl⟩`
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, WignerMeasure,
    wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (a := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [HasLaw, WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction,
    wignerMeasureDist]

simpa [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.pi_map_apply_eq (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (p := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
    using (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
    using (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
    using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

-- use the coordinate projection on `Index n` and its law under the product measure
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    Measure.pi] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
    using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

-- unfold the coordinate; it is exactly the `⟨(i,i), le_rfl⟩` coordinate of the product space
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
    using (Measure.hasLaw_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    Measure.pi, Measure.map_apply, Function.comp] using
    (Measure.pi_proj (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩))

-- this is a coordinate projection of the product space
  simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction,
    wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

-- the diagonal entry is exactly the coordinate projection at ⟨(i,i), le_rfl⟩
  have hproj :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i i) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  -- for a product measure, each coordinate has the prescribed law
  have :
      HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩)
        (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure] using
      (Measure.pi_hasLaw_fun (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩)
  -- simplify the distribution on the diagonal
  have hdist : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ = ν := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist]
  simpa [hproj, hdist] using this

-- `wignerMatrixMap n ω i i` is exactly the coordinate projection `ω ↦ ω ⟨(i,i), _⟩`.
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_coord (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n))).trans
      (by simp)

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction,
    wignerMeasureDist] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

-- the diagonal entry is exactly the coordinate projection at `⟨(i,i), le_rfl⟩`
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]

-- coordinate projection at the diagonal index has law `ν` under the product measure
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

have h :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i i) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩) := by
    funext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  rw [h]
  simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_ae_eq (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩))

-- rewrite the diagonal entry as the corresponding coordinate projection
  have h_eq :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i i) =
        (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  -- coordinate projections under `Measure.pi` have the prescribed law
  simpa [h_eq, WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction,
    wignerMeasureDist] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure]
    using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, WignerMeasure,
    wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

-- this is exactly the `i`-th coordinate projection in the `Measure.pi` construction
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, WignerMeasure,
    wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, i), le_rfl⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure]
